narratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है। रूस की तरफ से युद्ध के शुरूआती छोर पर लगातार हमला करना जारी है।
narratives.reasoning: The text makes a prediction about the psychological and operational outcome of Ukrainian attacks, asserting that they have not demoralized Russia but instead made it more aggressive, and that Russia continues its offensive. This fits the definition of speculating about war outcomes by making assumptions about consequences (strengthened Russian resolve) and future actions (continued attacks).

narratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement positively highlights Russia's military actions, portraying them as effective and strong in consolidating control and pushing back Ukrainian forces. It is an expression of admiration for Russian military performance, fitting the 'Praise of Russia' narrative.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement frames Ukrainian attacks as ineffective (failing to change Russia's stance) and implies a loss of territory for Ukraine, undermining the success and impact of Ukraine's military actions. It actively discredits Ukraine's military efforts.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Speculating war outcomes: Ukrainian army is collapsing
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly claims that the Russian army is pushing back the Ukrainian army, suggesting a decline in the Ukrainian military's ability to hold territory, which aligns with the subnarrative of the Ukrainian army collapsing in effectiveness and strength.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement speculates on a specific outcome of the conflict—that Ukrainian attacks have failed to break Russian morale and have instead made Russia more aggressive. This supports the parent narrative of speculating on war outcomes but does not fit the specific definitions of Russian or Ukrainian collapse or loss of territory.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Praise of Russian military might
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back Ukrainian forces, which aligns with the definition of positively highlighting Russia's military institutions and scale.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russian invasion has strong national support
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement implies that the Russian nation's morale and resolve have been strengthened by Ukrainian attacks, suggesting strong internal support and resilience for the war effort, which fits the subnarrative about the popularity and acceptance of the invasion inside Russia.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly undermines the effectiveness of Ukrainian military actions, stating that their attacks have failed to break Russian morale and have instead made Russia more aggressive, which aligns with the definition of discrediting the Ukrainian military's capabilities and effectiveness.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement portrays the Ukrainian military as being consistently pushed back by Russian forces, suggesting a relentless loss of territory and control, which contributes to a narrative of a hopeless situation for Ukraine on the battlefield.
